title: Device Forensics: Cisco ASA / AnyConnect — Live CLI
description: ASA-VPN-01 let an attacker brute-force a contractor VPN account that shouldn't have been reachable without MFA. Connect to the device, walk the tunnel-group config + VPN session DB + logging.

hints.text: `connect asa-vpn-01`. `enable` with `n0c-l3v3l-15`. Start with `show vpn-sessiondb anyconnect`.
ASA group-policies carry `anyconnect mfa enable|disable`. Find the one with `disable` and follow it back to a tunnel-group.
`show logging | include REDACTED` shows brute force + connection-built events together.
